name: presence_studio_editor_foundation
summary: Added the backend/data foundation for a versioned, owner-only Presence Studio editor. Public Room responses now expose only the active published editable config.

tests_run.command: python -m compileall -q app\services\presence_editor_config.py app\api\presence_graph.py app\services\presence_service.py app\services\presence_pass_service.py app\models.py

known_limitations: Studio editor UI is not implemented in this pass.
GGM frontend renderer still needs to consume node.editable_config and fall back to current constants only for missing fields.
The GGM example config was created as a contract artifact/test payload; hosted production database seeding was not run.
Preview is authenticated owner-context only; there is no public draft preview endpoint.
Migration was added but not applied to hosted infrastructure.
claude_frontend_handoff_prompt: You are Claude working on the Presence Studio frontend/editor. Do not redesign the public GGM Room. Build the owner-only Studio UI on top of the new backend contract. Use the owner editor endpoints under /api/presence/owner/rooms/<room_id>/editor, /editor/draft, /editor/preview, /editor/publish, /editor/rollback, /editor/history, /assets, and /assets/attach. Use docs/program/evidence/presence-studio-editor-foundation-proof/GGM_CONFIG_MAPPING.md and ggm_editable_config.example.json as the schema reference. Build owner-only tabs for Scenes, Work Wall, Practice/About, Calling Card, Style DNA, Motion/Texture, RoomKey, Assets, Preview/Publish, and History/Rollback. Never expose draft config, private owner/operator emails, platform_admin, internal_lifetime_free, auth subjects, audit metadata, local filesystem paths, or raw secrets. Treat locked_fields as visible reasons, not editable inputs. Preview must call the authenticated owner preview endpoint and be clearly marked as draft preview. Publish must be explicit. Rollback must create a new published version from a selected prior version. Public GGM renderer should prefer node.editable_config when present and fall back to current GGM constants only for missing fields. Do not claim the Studio editor is complete until the UI reads/writes all core config sections and the GGM renderer consumes the published config.
